query: UPDATE agentSkills SET keywords = '價格,費用,價位,預算', rules = '{"type":"price","conditions":[{"min":0,"max":30000,"label":"經濟實惠"},{"min":30001,"max":50000,"label":"中價位"},{"min":50001,"max":80000,"label":"高價位"},{"min":80001,"max":999999,"label":"頂級奢華"}]}' WHERE skillName = '價格標籤規則';
